text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks so strong... But this is a G3, so I
guess I should've expected as much...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...Snap out of it, Spe! It's no good thinking about
things that'll just make me nervous!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right now, I need to keep my head clear, so I can
run this race with all I've got!
